{# find_contacts_tab.html — AI-powered contact finder inline in vendor detail. Shows existing prospect contacts and a button to trigger AI web search. Receives: vendor (VendorCard), prospects (list[ProspectContact]). Called by: vendor_tab route (tab=="find_contacts") in htmx_views.py. Depends on: /v2/partials/vendors/{id}/ai/find-contacts POST endpoint. #}
{# ── Header + Find Button ──────────────────────────────── #}

AI Contact Finder

Uses AI web search to find contacts at {{ vendor.display_name }}

{# Optional title keywords filter #}
{# ── Results area ──────────────────────────────────────── #}
{# Existing prospects #} {% if prospects %}

Found Contacts ({{ prospects|length }})

Previously discovered via AI
{% for p in prospects %} {% include "htmx/partials/vendors/prospect_card.html" %} {% endfor %}
{% else %}

No AI-discovered contacts yet.

Click "Find Contacts" above to search with AI.

{% endif %}
